title: OG metadata parser
description: Lightweight HTML meta tag extractor. Parse og:title, og:description, og:image, og:site_name, twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image from the first 100KB of HTML. No full DOM parse — regex or streaming scan over meta tags in <head>. Return a Card struct.
close_reason: Done: card.rs parse_og_meta() scans meta tags in first 100KB, extracts og:title/description/image/site_name/type, falls back to <title>.
